history.content:
<thought>
I am currently at row 02, column B facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 04, column D.
If I move forward, I will go from (02,B) to (02,C) which is a safe floor cell.
So, the best next action is to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02, column C facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 04, column D. Moving forward will take me to row 02, column D, which is safe (floor). However, the goal is downwards, so after moving forward, I will have to turn downwards. For now, moving forward is safe and gets me closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02, column D, facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 04, column D. Moving forward will lead me to row 02, column E which is a wall (`#`), so I cannot go forward. I need to turn to face downwards (`v`) to approach the goal from above. Currently facing right, turning right will make me face down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 02 column D facing down (`v`). The goal is at row 04 column D. If I move forward, I will move to row 03 column D which is a safe floor cell (`.`). This will bring me closer to the goal. Moving forward is the best next step.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 03 column D facing down (`v`). The goal is at row 04 column D which is directly in front of me. However, the cell below (04D) is the goal and it is safe, so I will move forward to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
